title: Update podmanV2 to use containers.conf
body:
Move some default processing code around so that it can be shard between
podmanv1 and V2.

Switch to using --time as opposed to --timeout to better match Docker.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

We don't want to tie V2 to golang library.  Some of these defaults are used in client.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5700) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
LGTM but want a signoff by @jwhonce
